title: Link
description: A typed hyperlink in the HAL/JSON+HAL style, carrying a relation type (`rel`) and an absolute URI (`href`).

rel.description: The link relation type (e.g. "self", "documentation", "related"). Should be an IANA-registered relation or a custom URI.

href.description: The absolute URI of the linked resource.

type.description: Optional MIME type of the linked resource (e.g. "application/json").
